positive: A symmetrical, detailed celestial mandala composed of glowing bioluminescent flora, abstract geometric constellations, and swirling cosmic dust. The main subject is a stylized, intricate bioluminescent orchid cluster emerging from a starry nebula void. The design must feature thick, clean silhouettes, strong contrast between deep midnight blue and glowing cyan/magenta accents, and high decorative detail suitable for apparel printing. Composition should be centered and radial, emphasizing symmetry. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with vaporwave cosmic aesthetics. Lighting: High-contrast, deep ambient glow, cinematic lighting.
